info.title: SenAI Agentic CRM Platform Core API
info.description: Production-grade automated triage engine using multi-layered heuristic sorting and Gemini-powered ReAct execution loops.

post.description: Validates schema structures synchronously, checks message idempotency, and runs Layer 1 heuristic filters.
Calls Gemini to output structured entity metadata, sentiment vectors, and conditional RAG context injections.
Triggers the ReAct agent framework loop to match internal workflows, open system tickets, or route legal flags.

200.description: Agent loop execution sequence resolved safely.
